0.response: {"Q0":"I concentrated more on the gems than the lottery because the gems were a sure thing, the lottery was unlikely. I was hoping for more meteor showers to make up for the probability the lottery wouldn't go my way but I had very few sadly. "}

7.response: {"Q0":"I felt like the lottery was out of my control so I put most of my effort into planets and gems. Once I only had one planet left to dig on I paid more attention to lottery probability "}

9.response: {"Q0":"no everything was clear and this was extremely fun, thank you. "}

1.response: {"Q0":"Not really, I really tried hard to focus on the digging and paying attention to the colors of the planets. "}

2.response: {"Q0":"maybe 35% of the time? It felt like some games had a high probability and other games it felt like mostly rocks. "}

6.response: {"Q0":"no, I only had one meteor shower after the astronaut left and I knew not to collect that color gems. I debated on if i should collect the green gems in frost though, didn't want to lose gold if they were the wrong color. "}

8.response: {"Q0":"I paid more attention on planets because doing that right was a sure way to maximize my bonus, the lottery felt predetermined although I know the game said it was not. I cared way more about the gems and planets, hoping for more meteor showers. "}

10.response: {"Q0":"sometimes the a and s lottery buttons didn't do what I wanted to but I am not sure if that was my error or a game bug. "}

11.response: {"Q0":"I'm really glad I was able to participate, this was so much fun. Thank you. "}
